query:
SELECT dc.id as channel_id, dc.created_at,
                  u.username as other_username
           FROM dm_channels dc
           JOIN users u ON u.id = CASE
               WHEN dc.user_a = $1 THEN dc.user_b
               ELSE dc.user_a
           END
           WHERE dc.user_a = $1 OR dc.user_b = $1
           ORDER BY dc.created_at DESC
